final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster inspired by the aesthetic of 大话西游, reimagined in 90s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: needs a 90s 港片 film aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a romantic embrace as the foreground focal point, two figures in the background at distance
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 sharing a kiss/embrace on a city wall (foreground), 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the far background
Scene/backdrop: must include a dramatic city wall setting
Lighting/mood: needs a cinematic, emotionally charged 90s Hong Kong film atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, faded, filmic direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture throughout
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
